about.heading: Born under a northern sky
about.paragraph1: Natalie is a vocalist from Russia who sings as if two worlds live in one voice. One belongs to the golden age — smoky jazz clubs, big-band swing, a rose behind the ear and pearls in the hair. The other belongs to the storm — gothic metal, Nordic folk and the wild, aching songs of the night.
about.paragraph2: She takes the songs the world already loves and lets them pass through her like moonlight through a forest — they come out changed: quieter, darker, closer. Under the name Northern Sky, she records vocal covers that wander from the 1930s to the edge of midnight.
